# Marubozu

> The next generation trading hub. Profit Follows Discipline.

## What is Marubozu?

Marubozu is a web platform for active traders who want to journal their trades, track performance, manage wallet allocations across exchanges, and stay macro-aware — all in one place.

## Core Features

- **Trade Journal**: Rich-text journal with checklist, mood tracking, timeframe tags, and multi-execution support (entries, scale-ins, partial take profits).
- **Analytics Dashboard**: Win rate, profit factor, equity curve, drawdown, average R:R — behavior linked to outcomes.
- **Multi-Exchange Wallet**: Two wallet types supported. **Crypto exchange wallets** connect to Binance, KuCoin, Bitget, MEXC or Bitnuix — these exchanges are also used for pair retrieval and are the target for future automatic trade import features. **Virtual wallets** can represent funds held on any platform: traditional brokers (Trade Republic, XTB, etc.), banks, or any other account. For virtual wallets, pair data is sourced from Tiingo, Metal Sentinel, ExchangeRate-API, FRED and other providers depending on asset class. Marubozu is a tracker — no order execution is possible from within the platform.
- **Macro Dashboard**: Economic cycle detection, intermarket correlations, and money flow by asset class.
- **Personal Library & Docs**: Research, macro thesis, and past studies organized in folders; quick notes always one click away.
- **Custom Checklists**: Pre-trade checklists applied to every trade to enforce discipline under pressure.
- **Discipline & Streaks** *(coming soon)*: Daily journaling streaks and rule compliance tracking.
- **Economic Calendar** *(coming soon)*: CPI, FOMC, NFP correlated with trade entries.
- **AI Journal Assistant** *(coming soon)*: Answers questions from your own trading history.

## Pricing

Free 7-day trial. Subscription required after trial.

## Target Users

Active retail traders in crypto, forex, and equities — including traders using crypto exchanges (Binance, KuCoin, Bitget, MEXC, Bitnuix) and traditional brokers (Trade Republic, XTB, etc.) — who want a unified system to track all positions, improve consistency, discipline, and edge over time. Marubozu is a tracker: no order execution is possible from within the platform.

## Technology

Web application (SaaS). Works in any modern browser. No installation required.

## URL

https://marubozu.trade/
